zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hughes於1417年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯利阿福德時，他的父親Sir William Hughes26歲，母親Katherine Lumley22歲。他於1431年與Elizabeth Sheffield在英國越可爾內斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1450年在紐西蘭塔斯曼澤亞福德享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hughes于1417年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯利阿福德时，他的父亲Sir William Hughes26岁，母亲Katherine Lumley22岁。他于1431年与Elizabeth Sheffield在英国越可爾內斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1450年在新西兰塔斯曼澤亞福德享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hughes was born in 1417, in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Hughes, was 26 and his mother, Katherine Lumley, was 22. He married Elizabeth Sheffield in 1431, in Nesfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1450, in Seaford, Tasman, New Zealand, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hughes est né en 1417, à Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Hughes, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine Lumley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sheffield en 1431, à Nesfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1450, à Seaford, Tasman, Nouvelle-Zélande, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hughes 1417 in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Hughes 26 und seine Mutter Katherine Lumley 22. Er hat 1431 in Nesfield, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Sheffield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Seaford, Tasman, Neuseeland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hughes è nato il nel 1417 nel Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Hughes, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Lumley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Sheffield nel 1431, nel Nesfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1450, nel Seaford, Tasman, Nuova Zelanda, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hughesが1417年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスレアフォードで生まれた時，父Sir William Hughesは26歳，母Katherine Lumleyは22歳であった。1431年にイギリスヨークシュアイアネスフィールドでElizabeth Sheffieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1450年にニュージーランドタスマンセアフォードで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hughes(이)가 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 슬리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Hughes(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Lumley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1431년 영국 요르크실르 네스필드에서 Elizabeth Sheffield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1450년 뉴질랜드 타스먼 시퍼드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hughes nasceu em 1417, em Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Hughes, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Lumley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sheffield em 1431, em Nesfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1450, em Seaford, Tasman, Nova Zelândia, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hughes родился в 1417 г. в местности слифорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Hughes было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Lumley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sheffield в 1431 г. в местности несфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности сифорд, тасман, Новая Зеландия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hughes nació en 1417, en Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Hughes, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine Lumley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Sheffield en 1431, en Nesfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1450, en Seaford, Tasman, Nueva Zelanda, a la edad de 33 años.
